Explanation: The report demonstrates solid analytical work on chromatographic data despite significant data integrity challenges (>60% missingness). Strengths include clear methodology sections explaining ALS baseline correction, SNR filtering, and peak morphology assessment against USP ¡621¿ criteria. The visual outputs effectively highlight abnormal peaks with red markers across multiple chromatography stages. However, limitations impact the overall quality: (1) the data integrity issues severely constrain correlation analysis and root cause identification; (2) statistical rigor is compromised by reliance on univariate analysis and inability to link deviations to process parameters; (3) the Tailing/Fronting factor calculations use simplified geometric approximations rather than validated chromatographic standards; (4) code snippets contain numerous edge cases and debugging statements suggesting incomplete validation; (5) results are largely descriptive rather than providing quantitative statistical insights. Writing is generally clear but somewhat repetitive in results discussion. The work provides useful visual stratification and anomaly flagging but would benefit from deeper statistical analysis, sensitivity testing, and explicit discussion of methodology limitations.
